course_descriptor: LazyLearn track, curated writing and speaking collection
deliverable_target: a faithful, practical chapter for How You Speak and Write, plus a per-course compiled PDF book.
visual_target: selected video frames are only supporting evidence for slide text, diagrams, blackboard structure, on-screen examples, and rhetorical structure; do not let them override the transcript.
mathematical_standard: preserve concrete advice, examples, process details, and any explicit analytic structure from the videos, but avoid generic filler or invented textbook exposition.
style_target: notes should read like polished companion notes for a serious writing and speaking course, with clean prose, explicit structure, and careful separation between principles, examples, and process advice.
credit_target: keep explicit credit to the original speakers as a curated multi-speaker collection and curation by LazyingArt LLC; reserve the website URL for the generated front-matter credit, not the prose body.
front_matter_single: Original video from the How You Speak and Write collection. Transcript-derived notes curated by \href{https://lazying.art}{LazyingArt LLC}.
front_matter_plural: Original videos from the How You Speak and Write collection. Transcript-derived course notes curated by \href{https://lazying.art}{LazyingArt LLC}.
reference_missing_text: No directly matching reference PDF is available for this course.
reference_no_match_text: Matching course reference PDFs were found, but no strong topical excerpt was automatically matched for this lecture.
reference_budget_text: Matching course reference PDFs were found, but no excerpt fit within the current prompt budget.
